text.title: CI Evaluation Gate Config Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for ci-eval-gate-config.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the repo ship a measurable LLM-backed feature with a fixture corpus?

example.trace: PR runs eval against 50-fixture corpus → faithfulness 0.91 (baseline 0.90, delta +0.01, threshold 0.88) → safety_pii 0.99 (absolute floor met) → latency_p95 1850ms (under 2000ms) → verdict=pass.
